name: Lawrence Gilman
abstract: Lawrence Gilman (July 5, 1878 – September 8, 1939) was an American author and music critic. Lawrence Gilman was the son of Arthur Coit Gilman and Bessie (Lawrence) Gilman, and the grandnephew of educator Daniel Coit Gilman.

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Palmieri
about_quotes.evidence: I learned from a gentleman named Harold Bauer... He told a gentleman called Lawrence Gilman, who was a writer, a musical writer for the New York Times, who wrote well about him... Quite extraordinary, because that guy, Lawrence Gilman, was apparently very heavy.
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Palmieri — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
